data.title: Jeanne E. Ferrer recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for her role in Maritime Industry.
data.description: In Violet, Louisiana on July 24, 2025, Jeanne E Ferrer has been recognized for her significant achievements in the Maritime Industry. As a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle, she is celebrated for her efforts in Championing Growth, Innovation, and Mentorship. Captain Ferrer exemplifies dedication and expertise in her field, making her a standout figure in the industry.

data.title: Beverly Wheeler recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member by Inner Circle for nursing leadership.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in San Antonio, Beverly Wheeler was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member of the Inner Circle of Excellence. Wheeler was commended for her role in leading the Next Generation of Nurses with Compassion and Expertise. The acknowledgment highlights her significant contributions to the field.

data.title: Frank R. Daebelliehn named Inner Circle Lifetime Member for supporting veterans and disability access.
data.description: On July 24, 2025 in Crosby, Texas, Frank R. Daebelliehn was recognized in The Inner Circle as an esteemed Inner Circle Lifetime Member for his dedicated efforts in supporting veterans and promoting disability access through service and sustainability. Daebelliehn's commendable contributions have been highlighted in the news.

data.title: Michael D. Lesem, MD named Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for psychiatric research contributions.
data.description: In a recent article in The Inner Circle, Dr. Michael D. Lesem, MD, was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for his significant contributions to advancing psychiatric research through psychopharmacology. Dr. Lesem, a distinguished psychiatrist, has been acknowledged for his dedicated work in the field.

data.title: Miguel A. Gonzalez acknowledged as a lifetime member of The Inner Circle for contributions to Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation.
data.description: In Converse, Texas on July 24, 2025, Miguel A. Gonzalez, CEO, was recognized in The Inner Circle as an Inner Circle Lifetime for his remarkable achievements in Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation by employing Innovative Healthcare Marketing. This acknowledgment highlights his significant impact in the field.

data.title: Grady Steve Mills recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for his 30-year career in logistics and communications for the U.S. Army.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Forest, a distinguished individual named Grady Steve Mills was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his remarkable contributions to the U.S. Army. This recognition comes after his impressive 30-year career focusing on logistics and communications.

data.title: Dow Jones dropped with surprise fall in jobless claims. Netflix triggered sell rule, Tesla slammed. Nasdaq up. United Rentals entry.
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following an unexpected decrease in weekly jobless claims. Netflix violated a significant IBD sell rule. In the stock market today, the Nasdaq saw an increase, while United Rentals passed a critical entry point. However, Netflix triggered a sell rule. Tesla also faced significant challenges.

data.title: WUAR partners with iHomefinder for tools in real estate growth. New benefit offers access to leading platform.
data.description: A recent development by the Western Upstate Association of REALTORS® (WUAR) includes a new member benefit aimed at enhancing visibility, generating leads, and fostering long-term growth for its members. The organization has collaborated with iHomefinder to provide exclusive access to a top-tier platform in the real estate industry. This partnership, initiated in July 24, 2025, in Eugene, Oregon, stands to equip WUAR members with essential tools for success in their respective fields. This collaboration promises to offer valuable resources to real estate professionals, potentially driving significant opportunities for growth and development within the industry.

data.title: Matco Tools unveils upgraded 6s toolbox for automotive technicians, featuring extra space, LED lighting, and swivel casters.
data.description: Matco Tools is thrilled to announce the revamped 6s toolbox tailored for automotive technicians and mechanics with extensive tool collections, aiming to deliver top-notch tool storage solutions. Proudly manufactured in the USA in Jamestown, New York, the upgraded design offers additional space, vibrant color-shifting LED lighting, and effortless mobility with swivel lock casters. The 6s enhanced model ensures the extra room needed for efficient storage and convenience.

data.title: Economist El-Erian advises Fed Chair Powell to resign to preserve the Fed's independence amidst political attacks.
data.description: Economist Mohamed El-Erian suggests that Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell should resign to protect the central bank's independence amidst escalating political attacks. El-Erian, the chief economic advisor at Allianz, believes that Powell's resignation is necessary to safeguard the Fed's operational autonomy. While some feel Powell should remain until his term ends in 2026, El-Erian warns of increased political fallout if Powell stays, potentially damaging the Fed’s long-standing independence. El-Erian argues that resigning now would be better than allowing threats to Fed autonomy to escalate. The US government’s criticism of Powell and the Fed has expanded to include concerns about mission creep and the effectiveness of other officials. El-Erian's views were shared on Twitter on July 22, 2025. For more details, reference the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Oregon invests $3M in Meriwether Group Capital's Hero Fund post $3M Meketa Investment Group review.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, the State allocated $3 million to Meriwether Group Capital's Hero Fund following a thorough evaluation overseen by Meketa Investment Group. This investment was made after careful consideration and signifies a significant commitment to support accredited investors in the region.

data.title: McDonald's launched CosMc's with quirky drinks but shut down concept. Now, prepping to test out 10 new beverages in 500 locations in Wisconsin and Colorado.
data.description: In December 2023, McDonald's Corp (NYSE: MCD) launched CosMc's, an alien-themed spinoff centered on coffee and snacks featuring unique beverages like the "French Toast Galaxy Latte" and "Pistachio Swirl Shaken Espresso." Opening eight locations in Illinois and Texas initially attracted large crowds, but interest declined. By May 2024, McDonald's closed the concept. The company is now gearing up to introduce a new range of iced drinks such as Creamy Vanilla Cold Brews, Popping Tropic Refreshers, and "dirty sodas" - sodas mixed with syrups and dried fruit. McDonald's will test these drinks in September at various U.S. locations. Approximately 10 drinks will be available in about 500 McDonald's restaurants, mainly in Wisconsin and Colorado.

data.title: SHIB price rises with neutral RSI at 54.25, signaling potential uptrend ahead. MACD suggests bullish momentum.
data.description: Shiba Inu has seen a slight increase in trading activity, with the SHIB Relative Strength Index (RSI) currently at a neutral level of 54.25. Additionally, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) histogram suggests a growing bullish trend for the meme coin.
